name: groone-desktop
description: GroOne Windows desktop app — licensed yearly subscription

scripts.build: npm run build:ts && npm run copy:static
scripts.prepare:web: npm run build:web && npm run bundle:web
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run bundle:web && electron-builder --win nsis --x64
scripts.dist:full: npm run build && npm run prepare:web && electron-builder --win nsis --x64
scripts.dist:dir: npm run build && npm run bundle:web && electron-builder --win dir --x64
